subcodes.first_line: Every morning when I awoke I praised God there was another day to serve Him in His prison.
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @thankfulness; gratitude, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow
